|strategy = 
* {{ii|Phantom Dancer}} provides the highest {{sti|attack speed}} out of all items.
|trivia = 
* {{iis|Phantom Dancer}} name is likely a tribute to the original [[w:c:dota|DotA]] hero [[w:c:dota:Phantom Lancer|Phantom Lancer]].
* You could see '''Phantom Dancer''' right next to the {{tip|Twisted Treeline}} [[shop]]keeper.

;[[V25.14]]
* Attack speed increased 65% from 60%.
* Bonus movement speed increased to 10% from 8%.

;[[V14.19]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2650}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|950}} from {{g|900}}.
* Movement speed reduced to 8% from 12%.

;[[V14.10]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60% attack speed, 25% critical strike chance, 12% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Become permanently {{tip|ghosted}}.
** Limited 1 '''Phantom Dancer'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 20 attack damage, 30% attack speed, 20% critical strike chance, 10% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacks on-attack grant ghosting and a stack of ''Spectral Waltz'' for 3 seconds, up to 5 stacks. For each stack, gain {{as|7% '''bonus''' attack speed}}, for a total of {{as|35%|as}} at '''maximum''' stacks.
** Limited 1 '''Phantom Dancer'''.

;[[V14.2]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Hearthbound Axe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|1000}} = {{g|2800}}.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Hearthbound Axe}} + {{ii|Cloak of Agility}} + {{g|1000}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 20 attack damage, 30% attack speed, 20% critical strike chance, 10% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacks on-attack grant {{tip|ghosting}} and a stack of ''Spectral Waltz'' for 3 seconds, up to 5 stacks. For each stack, gain {{as|7% '''bonus''' attack speed}}, up to {{as|35% '''bonus''' attack speed}} at '''maximum''' stacks.
** Limited to 1 '''Phantom Dancer'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Hearthbound Axe}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 20 attack damage, 35% attack speed, 20% critical strike chance, 7% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacks on-attack grant {{tip|ghosting}}, {{as|7% '''bonus''' movement speed}}, and a stack of ''Spectral Waltz'' for 3 seconds, up to 4 stacks. While at 4 stacks, gain {{as|30% '''bonus''' attack speed}}.
** Limited to 1 '''Phantom Dancer'''.

;[[V13.12]]
* Attack speed increased to 35% from 30%.

;[[V13.10]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Hearthbound Axe}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|2800}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|850}} = {{g|2600}}.
* Attack speed increased to 30% from 25%.

;[[V11.3]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|850}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|950}} = {{g|2600}}.
* Attack damage increased to 20 from 0.
* Attack speed reduced to 25% from 45%.
* Spectral Waltz stacks reduced to 4 from 5.
* Spectral Waltz bonus attack speed reduced to 30% from 40%.

;[[V11.2]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2600}} from {{g|2500}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|950}} from {{g|850}}.
* Attack speed increased to 45% from 40%.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer gives less attack speed than its item components combined.

;[[V10.25]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2500}} from {{g|2700}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|850}} from {{g|900}}.

;[[V10.24]]
* Updated icon.
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2700}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combined cost reduced to {{g|900}} from {{g|1100}}.
* Buff duration increased to 3 seconds from 2.

;[[V10.23]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|1100}} = {{g|2900}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 40% attack speed, 20% critical strike chance, 7% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacks grant {{tip|ghosting}} and {{as|7% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 2 seconds. Attacking 5 times causes ''Spectral Waltz'' to also grant {{as|40% '''bonus''' attack speed}} for the same duration.
** Limited to 1 '''Phantom Dancer'''.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 30% attack speed, 25% critical strike chance, 7% movement speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacking a {{tip|champion}} grants {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} and {{as|7% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 2 seconds.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Lifeline:}} If you would take damage that would reduce {{as|'''maximum''' health below 30%}}, you first gain a {{tip|shield}} that absorbs {{pp|240;240 to 600 for 10|1;9 to 18}} damage decaying over 2 seconds (90 second cooldown).

;[[V10.11]]
* Bonus movement speed increased to 7% from 5%.

;[[V9.23]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Brawler's Gloves}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|2600}}.

;[[V9.3]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Brawler's Gloves}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|2600}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2700}}.
* Attack speed reduced to 30% from 45%.
* Critical strike chance reduced to 25% from 30%.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Grants {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} and +7% movement speed while within 550 units of a visible enemy champion.
* {{sbc|Removed Unique Passive - Lament:}} Grants 12% damage reduction against the last enemy champion you basic attacked (''lasts for 10 seconds and refreshes with each basic attack'').
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} Basic attacking a champion grants {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} and 7% '''bonus''' movement speed for 2 seconds.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Lifeline:}} If you would take damage that would reduce {{as|'''maximum''' health below 30%}}, you first gain a shield that absorbs {{pp|240;240 to 600 for 10|1;9 to 18}} damage for 2 seconds (90 second cooldown).

;[[V8.17]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where Spectral Waltz passive would sometimes not trigger.

;[[V8.15]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2700}} from {{g|2800}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|800}} from {{g|900}}.

;[[V8.11]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2800}} from {{g|2600}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|900}} from {{g|800}}.

;[[V7.14]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer prevents some champion abilities (primarily stealth effects) from ignoring unit collision when no enemy champions are nearby - the condition for its own immunity to unit collision.

;[[V7.9]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2600}} from {{g|2550}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|800}} from {{g|650}}.

;[[V6.3]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2550}} from {{g|2800}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|650}} from {{g|900}}.
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Tooltip tracks how many times Lament's damage reduction saves your life in a fight.

;[[V6.1]]
* Bonus movement speed increased to 5% from 0%.
* {{sbc|{{nie|Spectral Waltz}}}} movement speed reduced to 7% from 12%.

;[[V5.24]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|2800}} from {{g|2700}}.
* Attack speed increased to 45% from 40%.

;[[V5.22]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Zeal}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{ii|Dagger}} + {{g|900}} = {{g|2700}}
* Bonus movement speed removed.
* Attack speed reduced to 40% from 50%.
* Critical strike chance reduced to 30% from 35%.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Spectral Waltz:}} While within 500 units of a visible enemy champion, you gain 12% bonus movement speed and can move through units.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive - Lament:}} You take 12% reduced damage from the last enemy champion you hit, lingering for 10 seconds after your last hit.

;[[V5.1]]
* Critical strike chance increased to 35% from 30%

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2800}} from {{g|2845}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|495}} from {{g|400}}.
* Attack speed reduced to 50% from 55%.
* Movement speed reduced to 5% from 12%.
* {{sbc|New Unique Passive:}} Your champion ignores unit collision.

;[[V1.0.0.140]]
* Movement speed reduced to 12% from 15%.

;[[V1.0.0.108]]
* Attack speed increased to 55% from 50%.

;[[V1.0.0.107]]
* Combine cost reduced to {{g|400}} from {{g|900}}.
* Removed the 20% dodge chance.

;[[V1.0.0.82]]
* Movement speed increased to 15% from 12%.

;[[May 15, 2009 Patch]]
* Attack speed reduced to 45% from 50%.
* Critical strike chance reduced to 30% from 32%.

;[[April 18, 2009 Patch]]
* Added a tooltip.

;[[April 11, 2009 Patch]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|900}} from {{g|850}}.
}}
